narrative:
Saltcreek-North/Tarlton (precinct in Pickaway County) has 865 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
